Tests if dividing 1 by the square root of positive zero results in Infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the JavaScript `Math.sqrt` function when applied to positive zero (`+0`). The test verifies that dividing 1 by the square root of positive zero results in `Infinity`, which is consistent with the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its expected outcome. It is useful for validating the correct implementation of mathematical functions in a JavaScript environment.
